dashboard_greeting_subtitle: Here is a quick look at the status of today's systems and operations.
dashboard_systems_ok_hint: Last health check: a few moments ago
dashboard_card_orders_desc: Manage and track currently active workflows.
dashboard_card_reports_desc: Download performance memos and periodic financial reports.
dashboard_card_stats_desc: Analyze data and future patterns with high accuracy.
dashboard_ai_message: I have analyzed sales reports for the past three months. Would you like to see sales forecasts for the next quarter?
orders_page_subtitle: Manage and track all your enterprise orders efficiently through the smart Looped interface.
notify_email_subtitle: Receive weekly summaries of supply data.
notify_browser_subtitle: Get instant alerts when inventory changes.
notify_ai_subtitle: Allow the assistant to send predictive analytics alerts.
assistant_body: Your smart assistant is now processing 12 supply-chain files to deliver tailored advice. You can restrict the assistant's access to specific data here.
login_subtitle: Please enter your credentials to access your dashboard.
login_validation_domain_invalid: Enter a valid domain or URL
login_reset_snackbar: Connect password reset flow when ready.
login_footer_note: Sign in to Looped Assistant. Secure and reliable access.
linkNotAvailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errorOccurredTryAgain: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ai_chat_empty: Start a conversation by sending a text or voice message.
ai_chat_mic_denied: Microphone permission is required to record voice messages.
ai_chat_error: Something went wrong while contacting the assistant. Please try again.
ai_chat_invalid_response: The server returned an unexpected response.
ai_chat_missing_html: The server response did not include a report.
ai_chat_empty_response: The server returned an empty response.
ai_chat_server_error: The assistant server encountered an error. Please try again later.
ai_chat_bad_status: The assistant could not complete your request.
settings_account_subtitle: Manage your profile, system preferences, and security alerts.
settings_logout_confirm_message: You will need to sign in again to access your account.
inventory_subtitle: Pick a warehouse and count mode. Built for fast floor work on phones and tablets.
inventory_warehouse_error: Could not load warehouses. Check your connection and try again.
inventory_type_full_desc: Count every product in the selected warehouse.
inventory_type_single_desc: Create a manual count request without picking products in the app; add lines in the ERP if needed.
inventory_full_zero_section_subtitle: Choose whether to include stock lines that currently show zero on hand in this full count.
inventory_full_zero_exclude_desc: Do not include items with zero quantity (faster typical floor count).
inventory_full_zero_include_desc: Also include zero-quantity items for full reconciliation.
inventory_scan_placeholder: Opens the camera scanner. You can also enter a barcode manually from the scanner screen.
inventory_scan_align_hint: Point the barcode inside the frame; it will be read automatically.
inventory_scan_permission_denied: Camera permission is required to scan barcodes. You can enable it in the app settings.
inventory_scan_error_generic: Could not start the scanner. Please try again.
inventory_barcode_not_found: No product matched this barcode in this warehouse.
inventory_product_empty: No products found. Try another search.
inventory_validation_type: Select full count or manual count.
inventory_validation_product: Select or scan a product for single-product count.
inventory_validation_request_name: Enter a name for this request to continue.
inventory_helper_complete: Complete the steps above to continue.
inventory_adjustment_empty_lines: No lines were returned for this adjustment.
inventory_save_lines_error: Could not save line changes. Please try again.
inventory_create_error: Could not create the inventory request. Please try again.
inventory_adjustment_missing_result: The server did not return a result for this request.
inventory_adjustment_bad_status: The server rejected the inventory request.
inventory_adjustment_missing_body: The server response did not include adjustment details.
inventory_section_manual_products: Products to include in this count
inventory_validation_manual_products: Select one or more products to continue.
inventory_catalog_error: Could not load the product list.
inventory_products_missing_result: The server did not return a product list result.
inventory_products_missing_body: Product list body is missing from the response.
inventory_products_bad_status: Could not fetch the product list.
inventory_home_subtitle: Recent inventory requests. Pull to refresh.
inventory_adjustments_search_filter_empt: No requests match your search and filter.
inventory_adjustments_list_generic_error: Could not load the request list.
inventory_adjustments_list_invalid_respo: Invalid response for the request list.
inventory_adjustments_list_missing_resul: The server did not return a result for the request list.
inventory_adjustments_list_missing_body: The request list is missing from the response.
inventory_adjustments_list_bad_status: Could not fetch the request list.
inventory_adjustment_details_load_error: Could not load this request’s details.
inventory_adjustment_details_missing_res: The server did not return details for this request.
inventory_adjustment_details_missing_bod: Details body is missing from the response.
transfer_home_subtitle: Recent stock transfer requests. Pull to refresh.

transfer_requests_list_invalid_response: Invalid response for the transfer request list.
transfer_requests_list_missing_result: The server did not return a result for the transfer request list.

transfer_detail_load_error: Could not load this request’s details.
transfer_detail_empty_lines: No product lines were returned for this request.
transfer_request_details_missing_result: The server did not return details for this request.

transfer_location_empty: No locations found for this warehouse.
transfer_warehouses_missing_result: Warehouses result is missing from the response.

transfer_create_missing_request_id: The server did not return a request id.

transfer_detail_add_lines_success: Products were added to the request.
transfer_add_lines_generic_error: Could not add products to this request.
transfer_add_lines_missing_result: Add products result is missing from the response.
transfer_add_lines_bad_status: Could not add products to this request.
transfer_add_lines_no_selection: Select at least one product with a quantity greater than zero.
transfer_delete_lines_generic_error: Could not remove this product line.
transfer_delete_lines_invalid_response: Invalid response when removing product lines.
transfer_delete_lines_missing_result: Delete lines result is missing from the response.
